children.text: that have been licensed under this chapter or that have been approved to engage in an activity under this chapter; and

with respect to which a license or approval has been suspended or revoked under , the results of any investigation made or hearing conducted under this chapter, including the reasons for the suspension or revocation.section 252 of this title

children.heading: Confidentiality
children.label: b Confidentiality
children.text: Except as otherwise provided by law, an officer, employee, or agent of the Department shall not divulge confidential business information obtained during a warehouse examination or other function performed as part of the duties of the officer, employee, or agent under this chapter.
